title: Prompt Exploration & Building
one_liner: Before the agent runs, the human should know what they actually want.
problem: An idea is not yet a task. The leap from 'I want X' to a prompt an agent can execute is bigger than developers expect — and skipping it produces locally-plausible but strategically wrong results.
solution: Treat intent-clarification as its own step. Use AI tooling to explore the solution space, then commit to a sharp task with scope, non-goals and acceptance criteria.
